mapper.select:
/* ====== secu.securityMgmt.accessFailLogList =========*/
SELECT TO_CHAR(A.LOG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS log_dttm , A.SUCC_YN AS succ_yn , A.USR_ID AS usr_id , B.USR_NM AS usr_nm , B.ORGN_ID AS orgn_id , FN_GET_ORGNM(B.ORGN_ID) AS orgn_nm FROM CMN_USR_CNNCT_LOG_HST A, CMN_USR_MST B, ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST C WHERE A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID(+) AND B.ORGN_ID = C.ORGN_ID(+) AND A.LOG_DTTM BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchStrtDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.SUCC_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.LOG_DTTM

/* ====== secu.securityMgmt.accessFailLogListExcel =========*/ SELECT TO_CHAR(A.LOG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS logDttm , A.SUCC_YN AS succYn , A.USR_ID AS usrId , B.USR_NM AS usrNm , B.ORGN_ID AS orgnId , FN_GET_ORGNM(B.ORGN_ID) AS orgnNm FROM CMN_USR_CNNCT_LOG_HST A, CMN_USR_MST B, ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST C WHERE A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID(+) AND B.ORGN_ID = C.ORGN_ID(+) AND A.LOG_DTTM BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchStrtDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.SUCC_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.LOG_DTTM

/* ====== secu.securityMgmt.accessFailFileDownList =========*/
SELECT TO_CHAR(A.FILE_DN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS FILE_DN_DT , A.USR_ID AS USR_ID , B.USR_NM AS USR_NM , B.ORGN_ID AS ORGN_ID , FN_GET_ORGNM(B.ORGN_ID) AS ORGN_NM , A.DWNLD_RSN AS DWNLD_RSN , C.MENU_NM AS MENU_NM , A.FILE_NM AS FILE_NM FROM CMN_FILE_DNLD_MGMT_MST A, CMN_USR_MST B, CMN_MENU_MST C WHERE A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID(+) AND A.MENU_ID = C.MENU_ID(+) AND TO_CHAR(A.FILE_DN_DT,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN #{searchStrtDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND #{searchEndDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.USR_ID IN ( SELECT A.USR_ID FROM CMN_USR_CNNCT_LOG_HST a, CMN_USR_MST B, ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST C WHERE A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID(+) AND B.ORGN_ID = C.ORGN_ID(+) AND TO_CHAR(A.LOG_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN #{searchStrtDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND #{searchEndDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.SUCC_YN = 'N' GROUP BY A.USR_ID ) ORDER BY A.FILE_DN_DT DESC

/* ====== secu.securityMgmt.accessFailFileDownListExcel =========*/ SELECT TO_CHAR(A.FILE_DN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS fileDnDt , A.USR_ID AS usrId , B.USR_NM AS usrNm , B.ORGN_ID AS orgnId , FN_GET_ORGNM(B.ORGN_ID) AS orgnNm , A.DWNLD_RSN AS dwnldRsb , C.MENU_NM AS menuNm , A.FILE_NM AS fileNm FROM CMN_FILE_DNLD_MGMT_MST A, CMN_USR_MST B, CMN_MENU_MST C WHERE A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID(+) AND A.MENU_ID = C.MENU_ID(+) AND TO_CHAR(A.FILE_DN_DT,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN #{searchStrtDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND #{searchEndDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.USR_ID IN ( SELECT A.USR_ID FROM CMN_USR_CNNCT_LOG_HST a, CMN_USR_MST B, ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST C WHERE A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID(+) AND B.ORGN_ID = C.ORGN_ID(+) AND TO_CHAR(A.LOG_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN #{searchStrtDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND #{searchEndDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.SUCC_YN = 'N' GROUP BY A.USR_ID ) ORDER BY A.FILE_DN_DT DESC

/* ====== secu.securityMgmt.fileDownLogList =========*/
SELECT TO_CHAR(A.FILE_DN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MISS') AS FILE_DN_DT , A.USR_ID AS USR_ID , B.USR_NM AS USR_NM , B.ORGN_ID AS ORGN_ID , FN_GET_ORGNM(B.ORGN_ID) AS ORGN_NM , A.DWNLD_RSN AS DWNLD_RSN , C.MENU_NM AS MENU_NM , A.FILE_NM AS FILE_NM FROM CMN_FILE_DNLD_MGMT_MST A, CMN_USR_MST B, CMN_MENU_MST C WHERE A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID(+) AND A.MENU_ID = C.MENU_ID(+) AND TO_CHAR(A.FILE_DN_DT,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN #{searchStrtDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND #{searchEndDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.FILE_DN_DT DESC

/* ====== secu.securityMgmt.fileDownLogListExcel =========*/ SELECT TO_CHAR(A.FILE_DN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MISS') AS fileDnDt , A.USR_ID AS usrId , B.USR_NM AS usrNm , B.ORGN_ID AS orgnId , FN_GET_ORGNM(B.ORGN_ID) AS orgnNm , A.DWNLD_RSN AS dwnldRsb , C.MENU_NM AS menuNm , A.FILE_NM AS fileNm FROM CMN_FILE_DNLD_MGMT_MST A, CMN_USR_MST B, CMN_MENU_MST C WHERE A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID(+) AND A.MENU_ID = C.MENU_ID(+) AND TO_CHAR(A.FILE_DN_DT,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN #{searchStrtDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND #{searchEndDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.FILE_DN_DT DESC
